metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace shipping the audio-transcribe-summarize skill: turn local audio/video into a corrected transcript and a structured Markdown summary using Xiaomi MiMo (default) or DeepSeek.

plugins.name: audio-transcribe-summarize
plugins.description: Turn local audio/video into a corrected transcript and a structured Markdown summary. ASR via mimo-v2.5, revise & summarize via mimo-v2.5-pro (DeepSeek supported by model prefix). ~1.6 RMB for 6–8 hours.
